framework_detection.summary: Vitest is the active framework. Root devDependencies include vitest, all discovered tests import from vitest, and packages/cli/vitest.config.ts defines a Node test environment.

command_wiring.risk: The manifest-detected root command only runs package test scripts with --if-present, so current package.json wiring guarantees CLI tests but does not guarantee server/shared/dashboard tests run from the root script.

missing_topics: domain/topology/content_ref fields for the new registry model
explicit semantic L0/L1/L2 taxonomy instead of path-depth derivation

covered_topics: fab_get_rules legacy path matching and description stubs
fab_plan_context shared bundle assembly and stale handling
missing_topics: selection_token issuance, cache TTL, and expiry errors
hard errors for invalid L1 selections and missing selection reasons
neutral requirement_profile and minimal description_index output
section parsing and missing-section warnings without full-content fallback
L2 > L1 > L0 precedence tests for final section output

covered_topics: API client request encoding and token reuse
UI rendering for description stubs and hit reasons
missing_topics: rendering of requirement_profile/description_index for the new plan-context shape

coverage_gaps.gap: Current tests only validate legacy shadow-mirroring nodes and derived stable_id behavior.
needed_red_tests: accept registry-first nodes rooted in .fabric/rules
reject RuleDescription.id and require stable_id-only identity
validate minimal structured description fields summary, intent_clues, tech_stack, impact, must_read_if, entities

coverage_gaps.gap: Init tests cover bootstrap/hooks/MCP setup but not the locked taxonomy artifact.
needed_red_tests: generate .fabric/INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md on init
encode the three-tier L0/L1/L2 constitution in scaffold output
preserve Markdown-only artifact contract without JSON sidecar

coverage_gaps.gap: Existing tests lock in the old path-depth shadow-mirroring model, which is the opposite of the new protocol.
needed_red_tests: stop deriving L1 from mirror path depth
compute semantic layers from explicit registry metadata
read rule bodies from .fabric/rules instead of .fabric/agents

coverage_gaps.gap: Current tests assert legacy entries.rules/shared.description_stub_union output, not selection-token planning output.
needed_red_tests: return selection_token
return requirement_profile without score/confidence/match_reasons/negative_reasons
return description_index with required/selectable flags
separate required_stable_ids from ai_selectable_stable_ids
keep initial_selected_stable_ids equal to required_stable_ids

coverage_gaps.gap: There are no tests for fab_get_rule_sections because the tool/service do not exist yet.
needed_red_tests: resolve final_stable_ids from token.required plus ai_selected L1 ids
hard error on expired or missing selection_token
hard error when ai_selected_stable_ids include ids outside ai_selectable_stable_ids
hard error when ai_selection_reasons are missing or incomplete
return empty section plus warning when a requested section is absent
never fallback to full rule content

coverage_gaps.gap: Audit tests only cover get_rules and edit_intent events.
needed_red_tests: append rule_selection events to .fabric/audit.jsonl
record required_stable_ids, ai_selectable_stable_ids, ai_selected_stable_ids, final_stable_ids
record selection_reasons and rejected_or_ignored_ids

coverage_gaps.gap: Tool coverage exists for update-registry schema validation only.
needed_red_tests: fab_plan_context tool schema/output update
fab_get_rule_sections tool registration and input validation
tool-level contract coverage for selection reasons and allowed section enums

coverage_gaps.gap: Current UI tests reflect legacy description-stub behavior only.
needed_red_tests: render required versus selectable items from description_index
show neutral requirement_profile fields only
display missing-section diagnostics and selection reasoning where applicable

test_utilities.usage: Primary reusable fixture helper for CLI init/sync-meta/forensic tests. Clones examples/werewolf-minigame-stub or creates empty temp roots.
Async temp project builder for server plan-context service tests using mkdtemp, mkdir, and writeFile.
Async temp project helper for get-rules service tests with in-test .fabric scaffolding.
Sync temp root helper for audit-log telemetry tests.
Comprehensive temp project builder for doctor/audit integration-style tests.
Simple shared package temp project helper for framework detection tests.

conventions.imports: Tests consistently import describe/it/expect from vitest, adding afterEach and vi when cleanup or mocking is needed.
conventions.environment: Node environment is explicit in packages/cli/vitest.config.ts and matches current test style across the repo.
conventions.fixtures: Tests prefer tmpdir-based disposable projects; CLI tests often clone examples/werewolf-minigame-stub for higher-fidelity integration coverage.
conventions.cleanup: afterEach typically removes temp roots and restores mocks/modules.
conventions.mocking: Use vi.spyOn, vi.doMock, vi.restoreAllMocks, and vi.resetModules for process, module, and child_process behavior.
assertion_style: inline snapshots for selected regression coverage
conventions.current_runner_limitations: Only packages/cli defines a local test script and Vitest config; the other packages have test files but no package.json test script.

relevant_existing_tests.relevance: Current baseline for stable_id and identity_source behavior in agents-meta.
Direct coverage for sync-meta stable_id extraction and current path-derived L0/L1/L2 behavior that must be refactored.
Regression suite for the old shadow-mirroring model; useful as inversion evidence for new Red tests.
Best current coverage for init planning/buildInitExecutionPlan and file creation guards.
Covers forced overwrite semantics around init scaffolding.
Primary existing server coverage for plan-context stale handling, shared bundle assembly, and description stubs.
Primary existing server coverage for legacy fab_get_rules path matching and description stub behavior.
Current telemetry baseline; should be extended for rule_selection events.
Only direct server tool schema test currently in scope; establishes tool-level validation pattern.
Higher-level audit/compliance behavior that will likely consume new rule_selection telemetry later.
Dashboard-side rendering baseline for description stubs and hit reasons.
Dashboard API client baseline for rules-context requests and token propagation.
